name: Lead Capture to CRM with Notifications

nodes.name: Webhook - Form Submission
nodes.notes: Receives POST requests from Typeform, Gravity Forms, or any form tool that supports webhook delivery. Expected payload: { name, email, phone, company, source, message }

nodes.name: Normalize & Validate Lead Data
nodes.notes: Cleans up the incoming form data into a consistent schema. Handles field name variations across different form tools. Calculates a basic quality score for lead routing.

nodes.name: Valid Email?
nodes.notes: Gate: only proceed if the lead has a valid email address. Invalid leads get logged but not routed to the CRM.

nodes.name: Log Invalid Lead
nodes.notes: Captures rejected leads so you can review them later. Common causes: spam submissions, typos in email fields, bot traffic.

nodes.name: Enrich - Email Verification
nodes.notes: Optional enrichment step using Hunter.io to verify the email and pull company data. Remove this node if you don't have a Hunter.io account -- the workflow works fine without it.

nodes.name: Merge Enrichment Data
nodes.notes: Combines the original lead data with any enrichment results. Handles cases where enrichment fails or is unavailable.

nodes.name: CRM - Create Contact
nodes.notes: Creates a new contact in HubSpot. Swap this for your CRM of choice -- Salesforce, Pipedrive, Zoho, etc. The field mapping above follows HubSpot's default properties; adjust for your CRM's schema.

nodes.name: CRM - Create Deal
nodes.notes: Creates an associated deal/opportunity in the pipeline. Adjust the pipeline name and stage to match your CRM's sales process configuration.

nodes.name: High Priority?
nodes.notes: Routes high-priority leads (score >= 3) to an urgent notification path. Medium and low priority leads still get logged but don't trigger immediate alerts.

nodes.name: Slack - Urgent Lead Alert
nodes.notes: Posts to #sales-leads for high-priority leads. Change the channel name to match your Slack workspace. Consider also adding a DM to the sales lead owner.

parameters.text: New lead captured: {{$json.firstName}} {{$json.lastName}} ({{$json.email}}) from {{$json.source}}. Priority: {{$json.priority}}. Quality score: {{$json.qualityScore}}/4.

nodes.name: Slack - Standard Notification
nodes.notes: Standard notification for medium and low priority leads. Less noisy than the urgent alert.

parameters.subject: Thanks for reaching out, {{$json.firstName}}
parameters.html:
Hi {{$json.firstName}},

Thanks for getting in touch. We received your message and a member of our team will follow up within one business day.

In the meantime, here are a few resources that might be helpful:

  • Our resource library
  • Client case studies

If you need to reach us sooner, you can reply directly to this email or call us at (555) 123-4567.

Best,
The Team

nodes.name: Email - Lead Confirmation
nodes.notes: Sends an immediate confirmation email to the lead. Customize the template, links, and sender address. Consider using your transactional email service (SendGrid, Postmark, etc.) instead of raw SMTP for better deliverability.

nodes.name: Google Sheets - Log Lead
nodes.notes: Logs every captured lead (regardless of priority) to a Google Sheet for reporting and backup. This gives you a single source of truth outside your CRM. Columns: timestamp, name, email, phone, company, source, priority, quality score.

meta.author: Relay Launch
meta.description: Captures form submissions via webhook, normalizes and validates the data, optionally enriches the lead via Hunter.io, creates a contact and deal in HubSpot, sends a confirmation email to the lead, logs everything to Google Sheets, and routes notifications to Slack based on lead quality score.
